subject: WM-0165 review: verified
body: No blocking findings: independent default Vite/Chromium graph excludes every forbidden module individually; wmDiagnostics=1 remains functional; real 1424x861 mouse selects resident 1:1 then resource 8:1 with exact 80/0/80; focused 53/53, web-shell 13/13, worker-smoke 18/18, typecheck, localization, boundaries, handoff, task validation, diff check, and quality 458/458 pass. Residual risks remain documented: no public Worker transport-crash hook, unsupported GameSession save/load, and oversized shell-bootstrap.
